M2000_DRUG_RGMN_RVW M2000 Drug Regimen Review This field indicates whether a complete drug regimen review was completed. 00 = Not assessed/reviewed
01 = No problems found during review
02 = Problems found during review
NA = Patient is not taking any medications CHAR 2 x x x
